rows.notes: Append-only triggers must protect ledger and quarantine tables.
Active mappings must point at a real card_print.
More than one active card_print_identity row points at the same card_print.
Active identity domain hashes must remain unique.
Canonical/public views must not reference quarantine_records.
Section membership owner must match both section owner and exact copy owner.
Promotion staging rows require founder approval identity and timestamp.
Legacy canonical card_prints still missing gv_id.
Historical many-to-one source/card mapping groups remain deferred repair debt.
Canonical non-excluded card_prints without active identity rows remain deferred debt.

checks.detail: Runtime scopes resolve authoritative contract names and known checkpoints.
Runtime audit, scope registry, execution policies, and proof modes agree for enforced canon paths.
